reviews.comment:
Buscando lá ubicación ,para poder contactar a un amigo ,sé lá casa , Pero no tengo El telefono para comunicar-me con El, lá ubicación és lá calle del ACA y voy detrás em outra calle .

(Translated by Google)
Looking for the location, to be able to contact a friend, I know the house, but I don't have the phone to communicate with him, the location is the street of the ACA and I go behind it in another street.

reviews.comment:
Recién compré un té y 1 paquete pastilla DRF y me cobraron $5000, soy socio ACA, no me dieron ticket ni descuento.

(Translated by Google)
I just bought a tea and a pack of DRF pills and they charged me $5,000. I'm an ACA member, and they didn't give me a ticket or a discount.
